title: Bagram, Benghazi, and blame: Trump meets reality in Iran botch-up
content: The loss of U.S. aircraft and a missing pilot in Iran presents a critical political test for President Trump, whose image of invincibility is challenged by the escalating conflict. A high-stakes rescue operation is underway, with the outcome potentially validating or undermining his claims of strong leadership.

title: Tamil Nadu polls: Is there any space for Vijay's TVK in the duopoly between DMK-AIADMK?
content: Actor Vijay Thalapathy's new party, TVK, is emerging as a third option in Tamil Nadu politics, challenging the long-standing dominance of DMK and AIADMK. With populist welfare promises and a strong social media presence, TVK aims to capture the significant unaligned vote, though electoral history suggests challenges remain.

title: 'Ghatak' MP vs Kejriwal's 'soldiers': The Raghav Chadha showdown explained
content: Aam Aadmi Party MP Raghav Chadha has broken his silence after being removed as Rajya Sabha deputy leader. He denies allegations of 'soft PR' and deviating from the party line. Chadha states his silence should not be mistaken for defeat. He challenges his party to provide evidence for their claims. The controversy has drawn reactions from political opponents.

title: Amid job cuts, Canadian billionaire Kevin O’Leary points out a good thing about AI layoffs
content: Kevin O'Leary, the Canadian billionaire, asserts that artificial intelligence is elevating human creativity, making artists and storytellers more valuable than ever. He highlights how compelling social media content, especially short-form videos, now commands significant salaries due to measurable customer acquisition. O'Leary believes AI is a powerful productivity tool, fostering new industries and opportunities across all economic sectors.

title: Trump’s Xi moment? A military purge unfolds in the US
content: US President Trump's administration has overseen a significant churn in senior US military leadership, with multiple high-ranking officers exiting their posts. These removals, including Army Chief of Staff Gen Randy George, have raised concerns about institutional continuity and operational decision-making amid ongoing conflicts. The administration frames these changes as streamlining efforts, though critics question the impact on experienced leadership.

title: Middle East conflict may hit India’s exports beyond region if prolonged, says government
content: A prolonged Middle East conflict could significantly impact India's exports, both regionally and globally, due to supply chain disruptions, Commerce Secretary Rajesh Agrawal warned. He urged the pharmaceutical industry to reduce reliance on imported raw materials and build stronger domestic capacities to mitigate these risks and ensure continued growth in the sector.

title: Reason the 6am email from 'Oracle leadership' told thousands of laid-off employees
content: Oracle has begun its largest-ever round of layoffs, with employees receiving termination emails from "Oracle Leadership" at 6AM saying their roles had been eliminated after "careful consideration of Oracle's current business needs." Around 10,000 employees have reportedly been cut so far, with estimates suggesting the total could reach 30,000. The email gave employees a narrow window to act before systems were deactivated.

title: ‘This has happened before’: How science explains Déjà Vu and the feeling of life on replay
content: An uncanny feeling of having lived a moment before, known as déjà vu, is explored by scientists. This sensation, often dismissed as a trick of the mind, is now understood as a healthy brain's 'fact-checking' mechanism detecting a mismatch between familiarity and reality. Researchers suggest it reveals much about memory and perception.

title: OpenClaw creator, who Sam Altman hired for millions, reacts to Anthropic banning his AI Agent
content: Anthropic has stopped supporting OpenClaw for its Claude subscriptions. This decision follows a recent leak of Anthropic's Claude Code source code. Anthropic cites increased demand and usage patterns of third-party tools as reasons for the change. Subscribers will receive credits and can purchase discounted usage bundles. OpenClaw's creator expressed disappointment but acknowledged efforts to mitigate the impact.

title: India’s pharma exports rise 5.6% to $28.29 billion till Feb in FY26
content: India's pharmaceutical exports are thriving, reaching $28.29 billion in April-February FY26, a 5.6% rise despite global challenges. The sector, currently valued at $60 billion, is projected to hit $130 billion by 2030. Leaders are optimistic about continued growth, even with potential US tariff impacts on future exports.

title: 154.2 kmph! Ashok Sharma fires the fastest bowl of IPL 2026
content: Ashok Sharma stole the show with a 154.2 kmph delivery, the fastest of IPL 2026, surpassing Anrich Nortje. The Gujarat Titans pacer impressed with consistent pace. Despite this, Rajasthan Royals posted 210/6, powered by Yashasvi Jaiswal’s fifty and Dhruv Jurel’s 75. Gujarat, missing Shubman Gill, faced a tough chase against a confident Rajasthan side.

title: Why is Shubman Gill not playing vs Rajasthan Royals?
content: Gujarat Titans missed captain Shubman Gill due to a muscle spasm, with Rashid Khan leading in his absence. Rajasthan Royals, led by Riyan Parag, chose to bat first on a high-scoring pitch. While Rajasthan entered with momentum, Gujarat aimed to recover from a poor start, with added pressure on their batting lineup without Gill.

title: Happy Easter Sunday 2026: Top 50 wishes, messages and quotes to share
content: Easter Sunday mornings often bring a chaotic charm with a flood of digital greetings. This year, move beyond generic forwards with a curated list of 50 wishes, messages, and quotes.

title: 'BJP to take away Lakshmi Bhandar money': CM Mamata to woman voters in Bengal
content: West Bengal chief minister Mamata Banerjee has warned women voters against sharing bank details with BJP workers, alleging a plot to commit financial fraud and steal benefits like Lakshmi Bhandar. She also criticized the Congress for a lack of coordination on electoral issues and failing to stand with the people during difficult times.

title: Sooryavanshi, Jaiswal script IPL history, become fastest Indian pair to...
content: Yashasvi Jaiswal and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi became the fastest Indian pair to 500 IPL partnership runs, reaching the mark in just 248 balls and breaking Sehwag-Gambhir’s record. Rajasthan Royals, batting first after winning the toss, looked strong. Gujarat Titans, led by Rashid Khan in Shubman Gill’s absence, faced added pressure against the in-form opening duo.

title: Who is Suresh? Meet 21-yo Indian boxer who knocked out World No. 1
content: Indian boxer Vishvanath Suresh shocked world No. 1 Sanzhar Tashkenbay with a knockout at the Asian Championships, reaching the semifinals. The Chennai-born national champion has risen quickly through strong youth and senior performances. With multiple medals and sharp skills, he has emerged as a promising contender, signaling a bright future for Indian boxing on the global stage.

title: Is Donald Trump’s triumphal tone on Iran facing a reality check?
content: President Trump's claims of 'decimating' Iran are challenged by two US warplane losses. Allies are distancing themselves, with France and Britain focusing on reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Iran's actions are deepening economic fallout by disrupting oil flows. Diplomatic efforts continue amidst regional escalations.

title: 'All they care about is politics and power': PM Modi slams Cong for 'endangering' Indians in Gulf
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi accused Congress leaders of endangering Indians in the Middle East with their remarks amid the US-Iran conflict. He stated that Congress's statements risk angering Gulf countries, potentially jeopardizing the safety of lakhs of Keralites working there. Modi emphasized his commitment to their security, highlighting India's strong relations with Gulf governments who consider Indians as family.

title: Another global trade chokepoint at risk? After Hormuz, Iran signals Bab el-Mandeb move
content: Iran's top parliamentarian has hinted at extending maritime pressure to the Bab el-Mandeb Strait, a vital global trade route, amid ongoing disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz. This strategic move could significantly impact global energy and supply chains, affecting countries like India that rely heavily on these waterways for trade and energy imports.

title: IPL: Rizvi's masterclass floors Mumbai; Delhi make it two in a row
content: Sameer Rizvi’s explosive 90 powered Delhi Capitals to a five-wicket win over Mumbai Indians, sealing their second straight victory. Despite early struggles, 22-year-old Rizvi. who came out to bat as Impact Sub dominated the chase, overshadowing Suryakumar Yadav’s fifty and guiding Delhi home comfortably.

title: Rajinikanth on Jailer 2, KHxRK while dodging Tamil Nadu poll questions
content: Superstar Rajinikanth has confirmed 'Jailer 2' is nearing completion and will soon enter its final production stages, with the release date to be announced by the production team. He also revealed that a new project, tentatively titled 'KHxRK,' with director Nelson Dilipkumar is slated to commence shooting in August, keeping the actor's schedule packed.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 17: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 1,000 crore India net
content: Aditya Dhar’s 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' is on the verge of history, eyeing the Rs. 1,000 crore India net milestone on day 17. Starring Ranveer Singh, the spy thriller has amassed Rs. 963.03 crore domestically and Rs. 1,523.58 crore globally. Despite ongoing IPL 2026 season, the film continues to shatter records, surpassing SS Rajamouli's 'Baahubali 2' in North America and outperforming the Shah Rukh Khan starrer 'Jawan' and Yash starrer 'KGF 2' in its trajectory.

title: 'Felt like falling out of sky': Artemis II astronaut on Moon-bound journey
content: Artemis II astronauts have surpassed 150,000 miles from Earth, nearing the first crewed lunar flyby in over 50 years. Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen described the translunar injection burn as feeling like 'falling out of the sky.' This historic mission marks a significant step towards future lunar exploration.

title: 'Ghayal hoon isliye ghatak hoon': Raghav Chadha tears into AAP charges with Dhurandhar reference
content: Raghav Chadha refuted allegations after being replaced as AAP's Rajya Sabha deputy leader, calling it a "coordinated attack." He denied claims of not joining opposition walkouts, refusing to sign an impeachment motion, and raising "trivial issues." Chadha asserted he has consistently raised significant public concerns in Parliament over his four-year tenure.

title: What would aliens make of us? Why UFO fascination is rising again in America
content: As America eyes the moon again, UFO interest surges, fueled by Obama's 'real' alien comment and Trump's promise of file releases. Scientists ponder alien judgment of human conflict, while pop culture reflects our own fears. The Pentagon acknowledges UAPs but finds no extraterrestrial link, yet some claim 'nonhuman intelligence' is real, urging transparency.

title: BCB meets in Dhaka, talks India ties amid push for better BCCI relations
content: The meeting took place after​​ a communication had earlier been sent to the Board of Control for Cricket in India (BCCI) regarding upcoming bilateral tours and cooperation.

title: Watch: Magnus Carlsen poses for selfie, then gets her phone seized
content: At the Grenke Chess Festival, Alua Nurman took a selfie with Magnus Carlsen before their match. Though he agreed, Carlsen reported it, leading officials to confiscate her phone under strict anti-cheating rules. The game continued normally, with Carlsen winning. A similar incident happened last year, highlighting how strictly chess authorities enforce rules, even in harmless situations like selfies.

title: 11-year-old Indian-origin Bodhana becomes England No. 1
content: Indian-origin chess talent Bodhana Sivanandan, 11, is now England’s top-rated female chess player with a 2366 FIDE rating, surpassing Lan Yao. She began during lockdown, now ranks 72nd globally, and is a Woman International Master. She beat Mariya Muzychuk and earned praise from former UK Prime Minister and chess officials.

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: The big Annamalai question — what BJP gains, what it risks
content: BJP leader K Annamalai clarified he chose not to contest the Tamil Nadu assembly elections to focus on campaigning for the party and allies across multiple states. His decision, accepted by the leadership, allows him a broader organizational role, aiming to boost NDA candidates' prospects.

title: ‘Devil’ and gang: UP ATS cracks Pakistan-backed module targeting rail infrastructure
content: Uttar Pradesh ATS arrested four individuals for allegedly operating a terror module directed by Pakistani handlers. The group planned arson attacks on railway infrastructure and conducted reconnaissance of key installations across multiple cities, aiming to create panic and economic disruption. They were apprehended before executing a major attack near Lucknow railway station.

title: Why did Suryakumar Yadav replace Hardik Pandya as MI captain?
content: Suryakumar Yadav led Mumbai Indians against Delhi Capitals.  Hardik Pandya was unwell and missed the match.  Delhi Capitals captain Axar Patel won the toss and chose to bowl.  Mumbai Indians made several changes to their playing eleven.  The match took place at the Arun Jaitley Stadium in Delhi.  Both teams announced their playing XIs and impact substitutes.

title: Trump mulls big Cabinet shake-up as Iran war backlash deepens: Report
content: US President Trump is reportedly considering a significant Cabinet reshuffle amid growing concerns over the Iran war's political fallout and rising fuel prices.  Frustration over falling approval ratings and midterm election anxieties are fueling discussions about replacing senior officials, including intelligence chief Tulsi Gabbard and commerce secretary Howard Lutnick.  The administration faces pressure to project strength and address economic worries.

title: Cristiano Ronaldo not selfish: Jorge Jesus explains Al-Nassr sub
content: Cristiano Ronaldo made a strong return for Al-Nassr in their 5-2 win over Al-Najma in the Saudi Pro League on April 3. The Portuguese star had been out for nearly a month due to a hamstring injury. Despite the break, he looked sharp on the field. He also looked confident on his comeback. Ronaldo scored twice in the second half. The icon's goals helped his team secure a comfortable victory. His performance reminded fans of his importance to the squad.

title: A land that floats, a deer that ‘dances’: Inside world’s only floating national park in Manipur
content: Manipur's Keibul Lamjao National Park, home to the world's only floating national park and the endangered Sangai deer, faces significant challenges. Rediscovered from near extinction, the Sangai's survival is intrinsically linked to the delicate phumdi ecosystem, now threatened by climate change and habitat degradation.

title: Parker calls HOF enshrinement 'truly special'
content: Candace Parker, Elena Delle Donne, Chamique Holdsclaw and the 1996 U.S. Olympic women's team will enter the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame later this year, joined by Amar'e Stoudemire, Mike D'Antoni, Joey Crawford, Doc Rivers and Mark Few.

title: 'Frustrated' Geno, Staley have fiery sideline dustup
content: UConn's Geno Auriemma ripped into the officiating crew during a live TV interview and then got into a heated argument with Dawn Staley in the final seconds of the Huskies' 62-48 loss to South Carolina in the women's Final Four.

title: Jays place Kirk on 10-day IL with thumb fracture
content: The Blue Jays have placed catcher Alejandro Kirk on the 10-day injured list with a left thumb fracture, the team announced.

title: Mavs' Flagg, 19, is youngest with 50-point game
content: Mavericks forward Cooper Flagg became the youngest player in NBA history to have a 50-point game, as the rookie scored 51 in a 138-127 home loss to the Magic.

title: Abrahamson-Henderson out as Georgia coach
content: Georgia has mutually agreed to part ways with women's basketball coach Katie Abrahamson-Henderson, the school announced.

title: Szoboszlai: No 'fighting spirit' in loss vs. Man City
content: Dominik Szoboszlai has said Liverpool lacked "fighting spirit" in their 4-0 defeat to Manchester City in the FA Cup and said it is "hard to find the words" to sum up his team's poor performance.

title: Sources: NBA investigating Bucks, Giannis' health
content: The NBA is investigating the Bucks' handling of Giannis Antetokounmpo, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania, after the star forward told reporters that he is being held out despite being healthy enough to play.

title: Coaches push back on LeBron's Memphis remark
content: A pair of NBA head coaches defended Memphis and its culture following criticism by Lakers star LeBron James that the Grizzlies should relocate.

content: The biggest (and, in some cases, surprising) picks for the Fire and Tempo had a few things in common.

title: Haaland hits long-awaited Man City hat trick as pressure piles on Liverpool's Slot
content: Erling Haaland's first Manchester City hat trick since August 2024 helped send his side to the FA Cup semifinals in a 4-0 thrashing over Liverpool.

title: Final NBA MVP (and ROY) straw poll: Here's who voters are picking to win
content: Can Wemby's late push unseat SGA? Tim Bontemps polls 100 NBA insiders for the latest MVP snapshot. Plus, a look at the race for top rookie.

title: End of the feature back? What the rise of running back tandems means for the NFL draft
content: Splitting time used to be a mark against rushers. With top NFL draft prospects coming from the same backfield, that might be changing.

title: UConn on brink of dual title appearance brings 2014 to mind
content: UConn men's and women's basketball are both in the Final Four. Could the school make its first dual national championship appearance since 2014? The world was quite different back then.

title: Who are the 39 best men's U21 players in the world?
content: For the eighth straight year, ESPN brings you our list of the game's next young stars aged 21 or under. Who is good enough to make it?

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United, Man City pushing for Anderson
content: Manchester United and Manchester City are moving quickly to sign Nottingham Forest's Elliot Anderson. Transfer Talk has the latest.

content: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

content: The Middle East war, in its sixth week, has left the entire region in a turmoil. And, effects are both short and long-term such as inflation, energy crisis, sharp fall in investors' confidence, etc.

title: Qasem Soleimani Was Assassinated In 2020. Amid Iran War, US To Boot His Niece
content: Earlier in the month, Rubio also revoked the legal status of Fatemeh Ardeshir-Larijani, the daughter of  Ali Larijani.

title: Hope, Anxiety, Shifting Loyalties: Inside The Mind Of Assam's Muslim Voters
content: Over the past two decades, Muslims have played a decisive role in Assam's electoral politics. For years, this consolidation shaped electoral outcomes, with the Congress relying heavily on Muslim support as a key electoral base.

title: Allies Want To Let Sunetra Pawar Win Baramati Bypoll, Congress Not On Board: Sources
content: The Sharad Pawar faction of the NCP has already declared it will not field a candidate against Sunetra Pawar.

title: 5 Arrested For ISI-Backed Blast Outside BJP Headquarters In Chandigarh
content: The explosion occurred around 5 pm on Wednesday when a suspected crude explosive device was hurled near the office, officials had said.

title: 2 Drones, 1 Minute Apart: How Iran Hit CIA Station Inside US Embassy In Saudi
content: The US Embassy in Riyadh, like most American diplomatic posts around the world, does not operate its own air defence systems.

title: "Your Sons More In Danger With Trump": Iran To US Woman Claiming Pilot Son Missing
content: Iran downed two US military aircraft in separate incidents on Friday. One crew member was rescued, while at least one remains missing.

title: 'Politics Will Come And Go, My Priority Is Safety Of Keralites': PM Modi
content: Speaking at a BJP-led NDA rally in Pathanamthitta district, PM Modi said that the saffron party workers in the state have signalled a strong mood in Kerala to bid farewell to the Left rule.

title: "No Payment Hurdle For Iranian Crude Imports": India Dismisses Rumours
content: The Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas dismissed reports that an oil tanker carrying Iranian crude had rerouted mid-voyage from its previously indicated destination of India to China.

title: Blindfolded, Made To Kneel: What Happened Last Time Iran Held US Personnel
content: Iran shot down a US F-15E fighter jet, marking the first confirmed loss of an American aircraft inside Iranian territory since the war began.

title: As Alliances Shift, 2 Bodoland Leaders Hope To Play 'Kingmaker' In Assam
content: In the Bodoland Territorial Region, the battle is primarily between Hagrama Mohilary and Pramod Boro.

title: Magnitude 6.0 Earthquake Strikes Off North Indonesia
content: A 6.0 magnitude quake struck off Indonesia's remote northern Talaud islands on Saturday, the US Geological Survey (USGS) said, but there were no immediate reports of casualties or damage.

title: Telangana Man Drowns Twin Daughters In Well. He Wanted A Son
content: A father allegedly killed his four-year-old twin daughters following frequent family disputes in Telangana's Karimnagar on Friday, officials said.

title: Amid War With Iran, UAE Asks Pakistan To Repay $2 Billion Loan: Report
content: The UAE recently asked for the immediate return of the funds in the wake of the recent situation in the Middle East following the US-Israel war on Iran.

title: IPL Match Theft Racket Busted In Bengaluru, 75 Phones Recovered
content: In a major breakthrough, police in Bengaluru have busted an organised interstate mobile theft racket that allegedly used trained minors to target spectators during an IPL 2026 match at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium.

content: The MP rejects allegations raised against him by the party as ‘false’ and part of a ‘coordinated campaign’ against him

content: Congress targets the BJP-led Government over the Great Nicobar draft relocation plan. Citing a report by The Hindu, the party says concerns of local communities being ignored

content: Chief Minister  Mamata Banerjee said the culprits behind the violence and gherao of judicial officers in Malda district’s Mothabari have escaped but investigators were harassing the innocent locals in the name of investigation.

content: An estimated 15% to over 20% of adults experience vertigo or dizziness each year, with prevalence peaking in the 55-64 years age group

content: Kerala CM Pinarayi slams Rahul Gandhi for drawing equivalence between LDF and Hindutva forces in Chhattisgarh

title: Plea in Supreme Court challenges transgender law amendments as breach of right to self-determined gender identity
content: Activists Laxminarayan Tripathi and Zainab Javid Patel challenge the validity of the Act for disregarding transgender identity as an ‘authentic human identity, freely chosen’

title: Tribal adolescents in Odisha introduced to smokeless tobacco without family control, study finds
content: A study by the Odisha chapter of the Indian Council of Medical Research finds the prevalence of smokeless tobacco consumption at 61% among men and 35% among women in tribal communities

title: ‘Authority carries accountability’: Supreme Court restores bank manager’s dismissal
content: The top court noted allegations that the senior manager had connived with an officer and a gunman to misappropriate the money of customers for personal gain and steal bank records.

content: C.P. Radhakrishnan said, be it Buddhism, Jainism, or the idea of socialist revolution, everything took shape in Bihar

content: it's been over a week since north Carolina fired coach Hubert Davis . there have been few updates on the north Carolina Tar Heels' coaching search . despite a dynamic men's final four in Indianapolis this weekend, UNC will be a primary topic of discussion .

content: we asked draft analysts Matt Miller and Field Yates to break down the newest intel from around the league . a handful of top prospects still have private workouts with teams this month . what did we learn from the prospects not named Fernando Mendoza at his pro day?

title: 'Let her play': Chiefs launch petition for high school girls' flag football in Kansas
content: the Kansas City Chiefs announced an advertising campaign on friday . the campaign is aimed at persuading the KSHSAA to make girls' flag football a sanctioned sport in the state . in a 55-second video, the Chiefs showcased several girls who already play the sport .

title: NHL Power Rankings: New 1-32 poll, most important remaining games
content: there are fewer than 14 days left in the 2025-26 NHL regular season . each team has more than 10 games remaining . there are specific matchups that will have an outsized impact on the playoff races (and the draft lottery standings)

title: NBA playoff watch: Can Spurs stay red hot?
content: the San Antonio Spurs have won 11 consecutive games but still trail the Oklahoma City Thunder by two games for the top seed in the Western Conference . in the lone night game, the Detroit Pistons visit the Philadelphia 76ers ( 7 p.m. ET)

title: ESPN experts predict Final Four winners, national champion
content: the 2026 men's NCAA tournament is down to the final four . no. 2 UConn and no. 3 Illinois tip off the national semifinals . the results were close to a coin 50/50 in one game but closer to 70/30 .
